message: Node started: Design a greedy algorithm or a local search heuristic to select stamp placements. The algorithm should consider the current state of the board and pick a stamp m at position (i, j) that provides the largest increase to the total sum of the board elements after applying the modulo 998244353 to each cell. Since K is 81 and the board is 9x9, a greedy approach that iteratively picks the best possible single placement is a strong baseline.
